title: lithodora hispidula subsp. cyrenaica
intro: Lithodora hispidula subsp. cyrenaica, also known as Lithodora or Greek Morning Glory, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithodora hispidula subsp. cyrenaica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lithodora hispidula subsp. cyrenaica are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to alleviate various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
